title: kopsia larutensis
intro: Kopsia larutensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is a climbing plant that is native to the rainforests of Malaysia and is also known as the 'Malayan Kopsia' or 'Kopsia'. The medicinal properties of Kopsia larutensis include its use in traditional medicine to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of Kopsia larutensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues, including pain relief, digestive problems, and respiratory issues.
